rules: The winning team in the final
The losing team in the final
The winning team in the 3rd/4th place play-off
Most yellow and red cards - fouls committed will decide a tie-break
Eliminated by penalty shootout with fewest penalties scored - prize split between winner and runner-up if there are no penalty shootouts
Most goals conceded (excluding penalty shoot-outs) - fewest goals scored/games played will decide a tie-break
Eliminated at the group stage with fewest points - fewest goals scored/most goals conceded will decide a tie-break
